message:
feat(core): add merkle_tree.rs — Merkle tree for state reconciliation (ft-283h4.17)

Hash-based tree over sorted key-value pairs for efficient state comparison:
- MerkleHash: FNV-1a-based 256-bit hash with serde support
- MerkleTree: insert/remove/get with deterministic root hash
- MerkleProof: inclusion proofs with sibling path verification
- TreeDiff: added/removed/changed detection between trees
- Level hashes for incremental reconciliation

21 unit tests + 30 proptest properties (51 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
